list.name: The Movie House - Smart movie library pocket mobile application.
list.des: The Movie House is the newest mobile application to track all new, upcoming and discover movies and TV shows based on your favorites daily. For daily news entertainment reader, you can easily open the app and read latest news from application.

list.name: Horoquotes - Horoscope, zodiac & motivation quotes
list.des: Horoquotes is a mobile application for horoscope, zodiac, tarot and motivation quotes daily for everyone.

list.name: Pokedex
list.des: Pokedex is application will help you research name, type, profile, evolutions and moves of any Pokémon.

list.name: Brick Breaking BallZ
list.des: Swipe your finger to shoot the balls and break the bricks to score. Try to play as long as possible to beat yourself best scores. Collect coins to unlock new background during game and save it for spending more features in future update.
